query:
UPDATE users SET
               telegram_id = $2,
               username    = COALESCE(username, $3),
               first_name  = COALESCE(first_name, $4),
               last_name   = COALESCE(last_name, $5),
               photo_url   = COALESCE(photo_url, $6),
               language    = COALESCE(language, $7)
           WHERE id = $1
